title: Premier 200 Vintage Gold and Red Supabrights Multi Action LED String Lights with Timer
features: According to the EU Energy Efficiency Labelling directive, this product does not require energy labelling information.
Ideal for both indoor and outdoors, Great for decorating trees, hedges, window displays
Multi-Action (fitted with control box), Patterns include: Waves, Sequential, Slow Glow, Chasing/Flash, Slow Fade, Twinkling/Flash and Steady On, Timer function (8 hours on, 16 hours off)
Low voltage, Energy efficient, Supabright LEDs
description: This set of 200 LED string lights are set out on a green cable which helps to blend them well into your Christmas tree. With their multi action feature and timer setting, the lights can be set between 8 of its lighting functions including a static setting, which will light up automatically for 8 hours and switch off for 16 hours at the same time each day. So you won't need to worry about remembering to turn them off every time! The lights have a huge 16M lit length range and a 8M lead cable, making them perfect for both indoor and outdoor use. Suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, these non-polluting LED lights are the perfect addition to lighting up your tree or garden during this festive season. Saving you 90% on energy costs to!
